de: Ich musste ins kalte Wasser springen.
en: I had to take the plunge.
Baseline Translation: I had to jump into the cold water.
IARRT Translation (Ours): I had to take the plunge.

de: Sie liess die Katze aus dem Sack.
en: She let the cat out of the bag.
Baseline Translation: She took the cat out of the bag.
IARRT Translation (Ours): She took the cat out of the bag. (let the cat out of the bag)

de: Er trifft den Nagel auf den Kopf.
en: He hits the nail on the head.
Baseline Translation: He hits the nail on the head.
IARRT Translation (Ours): He is exactly right. (hit the nail on the head)

de: Bitte rede nicht um den heissen Brei.
en: Please do not beat around the bush.
Baseline Translation: Please don't talk about the hot brei.
IARRT Translation (Ours): Please don't talk about the hot brei. (hit the nail on the head) (beat around the bush)
